Projects

Python Power BI DAX Excel Freelance
Wonder Air Egypt — Sales Analytics
Real Egyptian AC company · 6 Sales Channels · Delivered in 1 week
+
69.8MEGP Revenue
3,700+Orders
75%Delivery Rate
6Sales Channels
4Dashboard Pages
  • Cleaned and standardized 6 raw Excel sales files (3,700+ orders) using Python (Pandas, NumPy) — handling nulls, duplicates, inconsistent formats, mixed Arabic/English values, and corrupt characters.
  • Solved a critical data quality problem: City and Region fields were entirely empty across most records. Engineered a custom extraction pipeline to parse raw Arabic address strings and derive correct geographic areas — then enriched each record with precise Latitude and Longitude coordinates for mapping.
  • Built unified master dataset combining all channels with brand, size, AC type, city, and revenue columns.
  • Top channel: Homzmart (1,544 orders, 26M EGP) · Top brand by units: Midea (1,034) · Top brand by revenue: Carrier (21.6M EGP).
  • ~62% of all sales concentrated in Greater Cairo. Top city: Cairo with 271 orders.
  • Delivered a professional 4-page interactive Power BI dashboard: Sales Overview, Channel Performance, Product Analysis, and Geography — with DAX measures, KPI cards, trend analysis, and a geographic revenue map across 26 Egyptian cities.
↳ Dashboard Screenshots — 4 Pages

SQL Server Power BI DAX Star Schema ETL
RetailDB — Intelligence Dashboard
Graduation Project · Route Academy · Data Analysis Diploma · End-to-End SQL Server + Power BI
+
$1.76MTotal Revenue
+112%YoY Growth
59.7%Profit Margin
269KTransactions
2.63%Return Rate
7Dashboard Pages
  • Designed a full Star Schema in SQL Server 2019 — 2 fact tables (FactSales 269,720 rows, FactReturns 7,087 rows) and 5 dimension tables with proper PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, and NOT NULL constraints.
  • Wrote business SQL queries using multi-table JOINs, GROUP BY, and aggregations to answer 4 business questions: revenue by store, monthly trends, gender split, and most returned products.
  • Built 2 master SQL Views (vw_SalesAnalysis & vw_ReturnsAnalysis) as clean pre-joined data sources for Power BI, with calculated Revenue and Profit columns per row.
  • Built 7 DAX measures — Total Sales (SUMX), Gross Profit, Total Orders (COUNTROWS), Avg Order Value (DIVIDE: $6.54), Return Rate % (2.63%), and YoY Growth % (CALCULATE: +112.2%).
  • Key insights: Revenue doubled from $565K to $1.20M driven purely by volume. North West = 48% of revenue vs Central West = only $9.3K. Return rate held stable at 2.63% as orders doubled — proving zero quality deterioration at scale.
↳ Dashboard Screenshots — 7 Pages

Python Machine Learning Scikit-learn Medical Imaging CT Scans
Lung Nodule Detection
University Graduation Project · Multi-Model Classification · CT Scan Medical Imaging
+
CTScan Data
MultiModel Comparison
HighRecall Priority
Accvs Speed Trade-off
  • University graduation project focused on early detection of lung nodules from CT scan imaging data using supervised machine learning classification.
  • Compared multiple classification models to identify the optimal balance between accuracy and inference speed — evaluating each model's suitability for real-time medical screening workflows.
  • Applied a full ML pipeline: EDA on medical imaging data, preprocessing and feature engineering, class imbalance handling, model training, and evaluation using Precision, Recall, and F1-score — prioritizing high Recall to minimize false negatives in a medical context.
